verdict_reasoning: TMED10 is a p24 family ERGIC/Golgi coat protein with 4 transmembrane domains. Its canonical and documented localization is the ER, ERGIC, and Golgi apparatus—endomembrane compartments, not the plasma membrane. No cell-surface-directed clinical programs target it; no documented PM cycling, dual localization, cell-state-induced surface display, tissue-restricted surface, or stable TM-partner tethering. The multi-pass TM topology resides in the secretory pathway, not the PM outer leaflet.
